name: rldyour-explore
description: Auto-invoked research skills for Codex: technical MCP research and authoritative web research with Russian user-facing output.

interface.shortDescription: Auto technical and web research routing
interface.longDescription: This plugin adds automatic research routing for Codex. Its skills should be selected automatically when the owner asks to research, investigate, study the internet, look up current information, verify a fact with sources, inspect documentation, find best practices, compare options, or close unknowns before implementation. tech-research is used before complex technical implementation: it closes feature scope through Context7 for official documentation, DeepWiki for open-source repository architecture, and Grep by Vercel for real GitHub usage patterns. web-research is used for broader internet research: it first defines questions and constraints, then finds authoritative sources, reads them, and synthesizes conclusions with links. The plugin does not store secrets and does not configure MCP transports directly; it depends on MCP servers provided by rldyour-mcps. User-facing answers remain Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Use $tech-research to research the technical scope before implementation.
Use $web-research to research this online with authoritative source links.
Use $tech-research to find official docs, repository architecture, and production GitHub patterns.
